Package org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources

Class DirectoryResource

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.BasicRestServlet
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig, Serializable, BasicUniversalConfig, DefaultConfig, DefaultHtmlConfig
public class DirectoryResource extends BasicRestServlet
REST resource that allows access to a file system directory.

The root directory is specified in one of two ways:

  • Specifying the location via a DirectoryResource.rootDir property.
  • Overriding the getRootDir() method.

Read/write access control is handled through the following properties:

  • DirectoryResource.allowViews - If true, allows view and download access to files.
  • DirectoryResource.allowUploads - If true, allows files to be created or overwritten.
  • DirectoryResource.allowDeletes - If true, allows files to be deleted.
See Also:
  • juneau-microservice Basics

  • Method Details

    • deleteFile

      public org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource.RedirectToRoot deleteFile(@Path("/*") String path) throws MethodNotAllowed
      Deletes a file on the file system.
      Parameters:
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      Redirect to root on success.
      Throws:
      MethodNotAllowed - If deletes are not enabled.

    • downloadFile

      public org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource.FileContents downloadFile(RestResponse res, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, MethodNotAllowed
      Downloads the contents of a file.
      Parameters:
      res - The response.
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      The file contents stream.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      MethodNotAllowed - If views are not enabled.

    • getFile

      public DirectoryResource.FileResource getFile(RestRequest req, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, Exception
      Returns information about the specified file or directory.
      Parameters:
      req - The request.
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      The file or directory details.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      Exception - If an error occurs.

    • updateFile

      public org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource.RedirectToRoot updateFile(@Content @Schema(type="string",format="binary") InputStream is, @Path("/*") String path) throws InternalServerError
      Adds or overwrites a file on the file system.
      Parameters:
      is - The file contents.
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      Redirect to root on success.
      Throws:
      InternalServerError - If the write fails.

    • viewFile

      public org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.DirectoryResource.FileContents viewFile(RestResponse res, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, MethodNotAllowed
      Views the contents of a file.
      Parameters:
      res - The response.
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      The file contents stream.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      MethodNotAllowed - If views are not enabled.
